instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: A memory leak problem was found in ctnetlink_create_conntrack in net/netfilter/nf_conntrack_netlink.c in the Linux Kernel. This issue may allow a local attacker with CAP_NET_ADMIN privileges to cause a denial of service (DoS) attack due to a refcount overflow.
output: A memory leak vulnerability has been identified in the ctnetlink_create_conntrack function within net/netfilter/nf_conntrack_netlink.c of the Linux Kernel. This flaw could enable a local attacker with CAP_NET_ADMIN privileges to initiate a denial of service (DoS) condition through a reference count overflow.
